title: Reliquified Ars Nouveau
description: Compatibility addon between Relics and Ars Nouveau
body:
![Title](https://i.imgur.com/EW0zNrq.png)

Reliquified Ars Nouveau is an addon that bridges the Relics and Ars Nouveau mods, introducing a variety of unique relics into the game. Each of these relics harnesses different Ars Nouveau mechanics, unlocking their full potential and enhancing the gameplay experience.

This mod requires Relics and Ars Nouveau!

![Art](https://i.imgur.com/nLgKo87.png)
